commit.message:
fix: move font variable classes to <html> so CSS custom properties resolve correctly

--font-jakarta was set on <body> but @theme references it at :root level.
CSS custom properties don't cascade upward, so the var() was failing silently
and falling back to the system font. Moving the variable classes to <html> fixes this.

commit.message:
Fix card flickering by consolidating animation triggers to section-level useInView

Replace all per-element whileInView (which each spawn their own IntersectionObserver) with a single section-level useInView hook. On mobile, multiple observers straddling the viewport threshold as the browser chrome shows/hides causes the appear→disappear→appear flicker. With one observer per section and margin: '-80px', animations fire reliably before the element edge reaches the viewport boundary.

- About: add useInView, replace whileInView on header + 3 value cards; stagger cards by index
- Products: add margin to existing useInView, replace whileInView on header + 2 product cards; stagger SlamXQ card by 0.4s
- Ecosystem: add margin to existing useInView, replace whileInView on header + 3 partner cards + logo glow (was viewport: once: false — primary flicker source)

Persist GeoIP cache across app launches to avoid rate limiting

In-memory cache was cleared on every restart, causing all IPs to be
re-requested each test session and exhausting provider rate limits.
Cache is now saved to UserDefaults and restored on init so each IP
is only ever looked up once per device.

UV座標U軸+V軸反転修正: テクスチャの左右・上下反転を解消

revolution, cylinder, tubeのUV座標を修正:
- U軸: u = 1.0 - i/n で外側視点の左右反転を解消
- V軸: v = 1.0 - i/n でglTF仕様(v=0=画像上端)に準拠
  cylinder: 底面v=1, 上面v=0に入れ替え

対象: revolution, cylinder, tube

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.6.7: guard against dangerous project root (/, home dir)

When Claude Code starts MCP server with cwd=/, ast-index would try to
index the entire filesystem. Now:
- isDangerousRoot() detects /, /home, /Users, home dir, /tmp, etc.
- skipAstIndex flag passed to createServer — skips init entirely
- Clear warning logged with fix instructions

Root cause of "230k files" and "context deadline exceeded" errors.

commit.message:
Full audit fixes: 20 bugs, UI/UX improvements, security hardening

Critical fixes:
- PDF export: fix prevPostsCount never aggregated + prevFollowers unstable formula
- Meta backfill: fix pagination break bug (nextUrl overwritten after break)
- TopPosts: guard against NaN when cohort avg is 0
- OAuth callbacks: validate tenantId exists and is active (all 5 providers)

Data/logic fixes:
- Sync: clean up stale "running" sync logs older than 30min
- Scoring: return "weak" (30) instead of "average" (50) when all data is 0
- Insights: guard division by zero when followers=0, filter empty parts in summary
- Content DNA: skip ratio when both values are 0 instead of showing "∞"
- Rate limiter: cap max wait at 5 minutes, throw instead of blocking indefinitely
- Token manager: add per-account refresh locking to prevent concurrent refreshes

UI/UX improvements:
- KPI: show "N/A" for engagement rate when data missing (not "0%")
- TrendChart: duplicate single data point to show visible flat line
- ScoreTrend: show single snapshot with message instead of disappearing
- ContentDnaCard: show empty state message instead of disappearing
- CollaborationCard: neutral grey for 0 shooting days (not alarming red)
- KPI goal bar: show actual % when exceeding goal, green bar for overachievement

commit.message:
fix: switch face detection to WASM backend for cross-device consistency

The humangl (WebGL) backend produced different embeddings on different
GPUs, causing cross-device face verification to fail (similarity ~0.27).
Switching to WASM (CPU) backend ensures consistent embeddings across
devices (similarity ~0.89).

Changes:
- Switch backend from humangl to wasm
- Update FACE_MODEL_VERSION to faceres-wasm-square720-v4
- Use precomputed embedding from detection loop in verify()
- Replace human.match.similarity with custom cosineSimilarity()
- Add square crop (720x720) and face size range check (400-450px)
- Replace gaze check with blink detection (iris disabled)
- Disable iris detection (unreliable on mobile)

commit.message:
Add tiered data retention system with archive DB and admin UI

Implements configurable two-tier retention: Tier 1 keeps data in the app DB
for a configurable period then archives to a separate MariaDB instance
(Tier 2) before deletion. Adds admin UI for managing policies, viewing
archive stats, and browsing archived records. Replaces the old
conversation cleanup loop with a unified retention loop handling requests,
chat, and telemetry data.

UV座標U軸反転修正: 外側から見たテクスチャの左右反転を解消

回転系プリミティブのU座標が角度増加方向(反時計回り)に進んでいたため、
外側から見るとテクスチャが左右反転していた。
u = 1.0 - i/n に変更して外側視点で正しい方向にマッピングされるようにした。

対象: sphere, capsule, cone, torus

commit.message:
Fix share link URL rewrite hijacking the deep-link handler

The syncFromLocation effect was rewriting /share/<token> to /app/model
before the async deep-link effect could read window.location.pathname.
By the time the deep-link effect ran (after userId loaded), the path was
already /app/model so the share handler never fired.

Fixes:
- syncFromLocation skips the replaceState for /share/ paths so the URL
  stays intact until the deep-link handler reads it
- initialPathRef captures window.location.pathname at mount time as an
  additional safety net against any future URL rewrites
- Deep-link handler replaces /share/<token> with /app/model (or /forge)
  after successfully loading the system
- Summary-scope links (no payload) are handled gracefully: switch to
  Model tab without throwing; flowchart is empty by design

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent Q/W key lockup using pressedKeys Set

e.repeat에 의존하던 방식에서 직접 키 상태를 추적하는 방식으로 교체.
탭 전환 등으로 포커스가 이탈할 때 keyup이 누락되면 이후 입력이
e.repeat=true로 처리되어 먹통이 되던 문제를 수정.
- keyup 이벤트로 실제 키 해제 시 Set에서 제거

Implement full CATEGORIES.md category matrix

## Seed (apps/api/prisma/seed.ts)
- 37 root categories: 28 standalone marketplace items + 9 section parents
  (Vehicles, Vehicle Parts, Home, Business/Commercial/Industrial,
  Alternative Fuel & Energy, Housing, Services, Jobs, Gigs)
- 115 subcategories under their section parents = 152 total
- Trailers / Marine/Boats / Powersports stored once under Vehicles;
  alternate navigation handled via shared-package constants, not duplicate rows
- 13 CategoryField groups: Vehicles (11), Vehicle Parts (7), Wheels & Tires (8),
  Housing (11), Commercial Property (3), Parking & Storage (4), Boats (7),
  Cell Phones (4), Electronics (2), Video Gaming (2), Bicycles (4), Jobs (3)
- Listing slug references updated to match new canonical slugs

## Shared package (packages/shared/src/constants/categories.ts)
- CATEGORY_SLUGS: typed constant for all ~150 slugs
- NAVIGATION_SECTIONS: browse UI groupings for all 10 sections
- ALTERNATE_NAV_SLUGS: [trailers, marine-boats, powersports]
- SearchParamDef interface + 7 param group exports matching search matrix
- getSearchParamsForCategory() helper
- All legacy exports preserved for backwards compatibility

## Documentation
- docs/CATEGORIES.md: full developer reference (hierarchy, nav sections,
  complete category tables, search parameters, DB schema, API reference,
  how-to guide for adding new categories)
- docs/DATABASE_SCHEMA.md: updated categories and category_fields sections,
  corrected listing_field_values references, added cross-links
